title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Allcargo Logistics

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Allcargo Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Join the Allcargo Logistics family as a Logistics Manager in Howrah. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Allcargo Logistics:
Allcargo Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Allcargo Logistics!
